pr_text:
## Title: Add defensive state validation to config_sib13 MBSFN configuration

### Summary
The `config_sib13` function in the LTE MAC layer previously lacked validation of input parameters and system state before processing MBSFN area configuration. This created a risk of null pointer dereferences and out-of-bounds memory access if the function was called with invalid parameters or before proper system initialization. The missing checks could lead to crashes during eNB startup or runtime reconfig
